title: Crispy Low Calorie Syrian Tofu Bhuna
description: This herbal, crispy, comforting Syrian dish features marinated tofu cooked in a spicy bhuna sauce, perfect for those looking to enjoy a low-calorie-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Spices (for marinade)
ingredients.notes: Including cumin, coriander, turmeric, and a pinch of red pepper flakes

ingredients.name: Water or vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: To thin out the bhuna sauce if needed

ingredients.name: Coconut milk (optional for a creamy flavor)

instructions: Marinate tofu in a mixture of spices, garlic, and water or vegetable broth for at least an hour. Drain excess liquid.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat until shimmering. Sauté onions and red bell peppers until softened.
Add chopped tomatoes to the pan along with coconut milk (if using). Simmer for about 10 minutes to let flavors meld together.
Gently place marinated tofu cubes into the bhuna sauce mixture, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for approximately 20-25 minutes until tofu is tender and slightly crispy on the outside.
Serve hot with a side of naan bread or as a standalone snack.
